title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Osmania University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Osmania University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Osmania University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Osmania University:
Osmania University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University!
